subcodes.first_line: Say: Praise be to God Who hath enabled the people of Bahá to partake of that which none but the Supreme Power hath bestowed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل الحمد لله الذی جعل اهل البهاء متمتعا بما لم یات به الا القدره العلیا و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @Crimson Ark; the Ark of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
